title: What Monstrous Other Calls Mercy
dramatic_function: violates the body or category boundary itself

signifier_package.room_logic: nothing stays clean once the breach begins

dialogue_grammar.speech_pattern: repeats human ideas back with one wrong emotional setting

narrative_payoff.resolution: the reproductive or invasive environment is destroyed at severe cost

opening_image: The villain's true weapon is not force but the ability to make harm sound responsible.
escalation_pattern: turns private loss into public doctrine
sample_lines: This will read better in the official report.
You are confusing fear with pattern recognition.
hooks: The villain does not want to win a fight. They want to redefine what counts as winning.
The threat becomes obvious only after the room, policy, or system has already taken their side.
The villain does not want to win a fight. They want to redefine what counts as winning.
